response.step_by_step_log: Identified Kobo Kanaeru and Arsy Widianto in the video. The song 'Bahaya' is introduced with on-screen text. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'Bahaya' by Arsy Widianto and Tiara Andini, found the lyrics in Indonesian, and provided an English translation based on common translations for this song.
response.global_summary: A video showing a conversational segment between the VTuber Kobo Kanaeru and guest Arsy Widianto, followed by a duet performance of the Indonesian song 'Bahaya'.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru and Arsy Widianto in conversation.
Kobo Kanaeru and Arsy Widianto perform the song 'Bahaya'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Actually, I want to be close to you
But I realized I can't
I shouldn't be here
It's dangerous, I'm falling more in love
I don't want to be far
I don't want to separate
Why is everything always beautiful
When I'm with you
It's a pity to end it

If you could understand
How heavy it is for me
I have to keep smiling
Even though my heart is hurt
Is there any heart of this love
If I don't end up with you
If it really, reference_lyrics_og:Sebenarnya aku ingin dekatmu
Namun ku sadari ku tak bisa
Tak boleh ku disini
Bahaya ku makin cinta
Ku tak ingin jauh
Tak ingin berpisah
Mengapa semua selalu indah
Saat dengan mu
Sayang untuk di akhiri

Andai kau bisa mengerti
Betapa beratnya aku
Harus aku tetap tersenyum
Padahal hatiku terluka
Adakah hati cinta ini
Bila ku tak jadi denganmu
Jika memang,song_title:
